race.comment: KOWLOON MAGNATE (3) returned from a lengthy break with a courageous on-pace fifth over 1400m at Taree on a heavy (8) surface. Maps to get the right run again and has the upside to go close. ADAMANA (8) back in trip from a wide gate with an eye-catching third over this trip at Dubbo. On the quick back-up and expected to go close. FIERCE IMPULSE (9) two runs this time in have been average and should come into her own over the extra journey. Can race closer from the inside gate and play a leading role. REGALADE (2) having his first run for the Brett Robb yard after being anchored with the 59.5kg for a plugging seventh over 1600m at Pakenham Synthetic. This looks easier and ticks a few boxes with the claim. THINK I'M IN (4) strips fitter and assess on the fifth two-back at Nowra. Tongue-tie goes on and keep safe.
